users_manage_chat_messages.name: users_manage_chat_messages
users_manage_chat_messages.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "chats"
        WHERE "chats".id = chat_id
        AND "chats".user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )
users_manage_chat_messages.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "chats"
        WHERE "chats".id = chat_id
        AND "chats".user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

public_chat_messages_readable.name: public_chat_messages_readable
public_chat_messages_readable.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "chats"
        WHERE "chats".id = chat_id
        AND "chats".visibility = 'public'
      )

users_manage_message_parts.name: users_manage_message_parts
users_manage_message_parts.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "messages"
        INNER JOIN "chats" ON "chats".id = "messages".chat_id
        WHERE "messages".id = message_id
        AND "chats".user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )
users_manage_message_parts.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "messages"
        INNER JOIN "chats" ON "chats".id = "messages".chat_id
        WHERE "messages".id = message_id
        AND "chats".user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

public_chat_parts_readable.name: public_chat_parts_readable
public_chat_parts_readable.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "messages"
        INNER JOIN "chats" ON "chats".id = "messages".chat_id
        WHERE "messages".id = message_id
        AND "chats".visibility = 'public'
      )

file_fields_required.name: file_fields_required
file_fields_required.value: (type != 'file' OR (file_media_type IS NOT NULL AND file_filename IS NOT NULL AND file_url IS NOT NULL))

tool_fields_required.name: tool_fields_required
tool_fields_required.value: (type NOT LIKE 'tool-%' OR (tool_tool_call_id IS NOT NULL AND tool_state IS NOT NULL))
